setup.enabled: XP system has been **enabled** for this server.
setup.disabled: XP system has been **disabled** for this server.
setup.roleRewardRemoved: Role reward for level **{0}** has been removed.
setup.roleRewardNotFound: No role reward found for level **{0}**.
setup.roleRewardExists: A role reward already exists for level **{0}**. Remove it first.
setup.channelIgnored: Channel {0} is now ignored for XP.
setup.channelUnignored: Channel {0} is no longer ignored for XP.
setup.importPlaceholder: MEE6 import will be available via the Bot Data Migration System.

config.value: The new value for the setting

roleReward.descrp: Manage role rewards for reaching levels
roleReward.add: Add a role reward for a level
roleReward.level: The level threshold for this reward
roleReward.role: The role to grant at this level
roleReward.removeOnDelevel: Remove the role if user drops below this level

ignoreChannel.remove: Stop ignoring a channel for XP

multiplier.set: Set an XP multiplier for a channel
multiplier.remove: Remove an XP multiplier from a channel
multiplier.channel: The channel to set/remove a multiplier for

import.mee6: Import XP data from MEE6 leaderboard

admin.set: Set a user's XP to a specific value
admin.reset: Reset a user's XP to zero
admin.resetAll: Reset all XP data for this server

rank.cmdDescrp: View your XP rank or another user's rank
rank.user: The user to view (defaults to yourself)

rank.title: Rank Card
rank.noData: No XP data found for this user. Start chatting to earn XP!

leaderboard.title: XP Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty: No XP data yet. Start chatting to earn XP!

admin.xpResetAll: All XP data has been reset for this server.
admin.xpResetAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset **all** XP data? This action cannot be undone. Type `CONFIRM` to proceed.

errors.notConfigured: XP system is not configured. An admin can enable it with `/xp-setup enable`.
errors.invalidXpRange: Invalid XP range. Min must be less than or equal to max.
errors.invalidCooldown: Cooldown must be between 0 and 3600 seconds.
errors.maxRoleRewards: Maximum of 25 role rewards per server.
